name: ui-harness
description: Shared phone-width layout checks for the fleet's Angular frontends. Apps import src/ui-harness.ts by RELATIVE path (Playwright transpiles TS outside node_modules). node_modules is a SYMLINK to ../life/frontend/node_modules — the harness must never carry its own @playwright/test install, or consumers load two Playwright instances and every suite dies with 'No tests found'.
